project_policy.policy_source_note: mcp__context-mode__ctx_execute および mcp__context-mode__ctx_fetch_and_index が settings.json で明示 deny。ctx_batch_execute / ctx_execute_file は settings 上の明示 deny に入っていないが、execution-like tools として quarantine 対象とする

probe.probe_blocked_reason: ctx_execute is deny-listed in normal profile; executing it would violate project policy. Probe requires isolated local profile not committed to repo.
probe.deny_restore_note: No profile was modified; normal profile deny entries remain active

ctx_execute_evidence.note: ctx_execute is deny-listed; cannot execute in normal profile

bash_evidence.note: ctx_execute is deny-listed; worktree cwd comparison not performed in normal profile
bash_evidence.upstream_756_documented_divergence: ctx_execute pwd shows main repo root instead of worktree path (from upstream bug report)

ctx_execute_evidence.upstream_756_report: ctx_execute reports main repo root and master branch instead of worktree
ctx_execute_evidence.note: Based on upstream #756 bug report: ctx_execute uses MCP server process.cwd() not session cwd

bash_evidence.note: ctx_execute is deny-listed; worktree cwd comparison not performed in normal profile
bash_evidence.upstream_756_documented_divergence: ctx_execute pwd shows main repo root instead of worktree path (from upstream bug report)

ctx_execute_evidence.note: ctx_execute is deny-listed; nested repo cwd comparison blocked by policy

informational_only.claude_project_dir_note: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is informational only per Claude Code docs; it is the stable project root passed to stdio MCP servers, not the session cwd. Must not be used for cwd correctness judgment.

local_probe_result.reason: ctx_execute deny-listed in normal profile; no isolated probe profile was committed

ctx_execute.reason: upstream #756 confirms wrong-tree execution; deny-listed in project settings

ctx_batch_execute.reason: Multiple command execution; same cwd risk as ctx_execute; sibling tool not yet evaluated

ctx_execute_file.reason: Repo-relative file resolution risk; sibling tool not yet evaluated

verdict_reasons: local probe was blocked by project deny policy (no isolated profile committed)
ctx_batch_execute and ctx_execute_file not yet individually evaluated
ctx_execute is explicitly denied in project settings
